---
title: "04: Stromal Sub-clustering"
output:
  github_document:
    html_preview: false
---

## R Libraries

```{r libraries, results=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(Seurat)
library(ggplot2)
library(harmony)
library(openxlsx)
```

---

```{r extract_stroma, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# This file demonstrates subclustering for the stromal compartment. The same workflow was applied to all other subsets of interest: T cells, myeloid cells, B cells, plasma cells, epithelial cells and endothelial cells
set.seed(2024)

data.combined <- readRDS("RDS/data_23_umap_30_clusters.RDS")
Idents(data.combined) <- "seurat_clusters"

# Stromal clusters identified in global annotation
stromal_subset <- subset(data.combined, idents = c("3","9","13","14","19", "24","29"))
```

---

## Subcluster

```{r recluster_stroma, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
set.seed(2024)

stromal_copy <- stromal_subset
ig_genes     <- grep("^IG[HKL][VDJC]", rownames(stromal_copy), value = TRUE)
data_no_ig   <- subset(stromal_copy, features = setdiff(rownames(stromal_copy), ig_genes))

data_no_ig   <- NormalizeData(data_no_ig)
data_no_ig   <- FindVariableFeatures(data_no_ig, nfeatures = 2000)
hvg_no_ig    <- VariableFeatures(data_no_ig)
VariableFeatures(stromal_subset) <- hvg_no_ig

stromal_subset <- NormalizeData(stromal_subset)
stromal_subset <- ScaleData(stromal_subset, vars.to.regress = "percent.mt", verbose = TRUE)
stromal_subset <- RunPCA(stromal_subset, npcs = 50)
ElbowPlot(stromal_subset, ndims = 50)

stromal_subset <- RunHarmony(stromal_subset, "sample_names", dims.use = 1:30)
ElbowPlot(stromal_subset, reduction = "harmony", ndims = 50)

stromal_subset <- RunUMAP(stromal_subset,    reduction = "harmony", dims = 1:30)
stromal_subset <- FindNeighbors(stromal_subset, reduction = "harmony", dims = 1:30)
stromal_subset <- FindClusters(stromal_subset, resolution = 0.4)

saveRDS(stromal_subset, "RDS/stromal_subset_umap_14_clusters.RDS")
```

---

## Subcluster Markers

```{r find_markers, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
stromal_subset <- readRDS("RDS/stromal_subset_umap_14_clusters.RDS")
DefaultAssay(stromal_subset) <- "RNA"
Idents(stromal_subset)       <- "seurat_clusters"
stromal_subset <- JoinLayers(stromal_subset)

data.markers <- FindAllMarkers(
  stromal_subset,
  only.pos        = FALSE,
  min.pct         = 0.25,
  logfc.threshold = 0.25,
  test.use = "wilcox"
)

wb <- createWorkbook()
addWorksheet(wb, "all_clusters")
writeData(wb, "all_clusters", data.markers)

for (cl in unique(data.markers$cluster)) {
  addWorksheet(wb, paste0("cluster_", cl))
  writeData(wb, paste0("cluster_", cl), data.markers %>% filter(cluster == cl))
}

saveWorkbook(wb, "csvs/stromal_subset_all_markers_seurat_clusters.xlsx", overwrite = TRUE)
```

---

```{r umap_stroma, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
Idents(stromal_subset) <- "seurat_clusters"
DimPlot(stromal_subset, reduction = "umap", label = TRUE, repel = TRUE, raster = FALSE) +
  ggtitle("Seurat Clusters")
```

---

## Stromal Subcluster Annotation

```{r stroma_annotation, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
Idents(stromal_subset) <- "seurat_clusters"

cluster_annotations <- c(
  "0" = "Inflam. fibroblasts",            "7"  = "Inflam. fibroblasts",
  "1" = "SOX6+ teleocytes",               "8"  = "Fibroblasts",
  "2" = "Myofibroblasts",                 "9"  = "Pericytes",
  "3" = "SOX6+ teleocytes",               "10" = "FDC/stromal reticular cells",
  "4" = "Pericytes",                      "11" = "Activated fibroblasts",
  "5" = "Crypt associated fibroblasts",   "12" = "Myofibroblasts",
  "6" = "Tissue fibroblasts",             "13" = "Proliferating"
)

stromal_subset$cluster_label <- plyr::mapvalues(
  stromal_subset$seurat_clusters,
  from = names(cluster_annotations),
  to   = cluster_annotations
)

Idents(stromal_subset) <- stromal_subset$cluster_label
DimPlot(stromal_subset, reduction = "umap", label = TRUE, repel = TRUE, raster = FALSE) +
  ggtitle("Stromal Subset Annotated")

saveRDS(stromal_subset, "RDS/stromal_subset_umap_14_clusters.RDS")
```
